glyphContext: Deploy + honest receipts for the baked-fp32-model / in-matrix-scope-filter cutover (commits e89fe53, 973e344, e8c2516, 8c362bc, 872e455)

image.previousRunningTag: quasar-server:latest sha256:8132fded4ea851a8afaffbea5f69df8711f18b43ba243a21d30782273899c0e3 (1.3GB, built before 8c362bc; no baked-model layer present in its history)

newBuild.growthVsPrevious: +550MB, matches the ~530MB fp32 ONNX model bake (nomic-embed-text-v1.5)
newBuild.buildWallClock: 55.055s total (simsimd native compile 15.5s + bake-onnx-model 35.8s + rest cached/fast)

migration.evidence: no store.migrate.fts_scoped_tokens event in boot logs; live PRAGMA user_version read from the mounted DB = 1, matching FTS_SCOPED_TOKENS_SCHEMA_VERSION=1 (store.ts:209,376) so the migration guard's early-return fired silently as designed

queryEmbedderLocalActive.note: SURPRISE vs task framing: this is NOT the ~1s the task described as 'prior verified run'. 27.45s one-time pipeline-warmup cost is consistent with this repo's own docs/proofs/query-embed-bench-2026-07-04.json (pipelineLoad loadMs=31907, gate limitMs=120000, pass=true) generated 5 minutes earlier outside Docker. The '~1s' expectation in the task prompt does not match any grounded receipt found in this repo and is treated as an unverified claim, not a regression. Boot and lexical are never gated on this load (queries fall back to bounded-synthetic during the window per e89fe53/973e344).

embeddingModelCacheDir.note: compose.yaml's QUASAR_EMBEDDING_MODEL_CACHE_DIR:-/app/.model-cache default was NOT overridden by platform/server/.env (checked: no such key present) or by shell env, so it resolves to the baked path, not a volume-shadowed path

clientTiming10Samples.note: first call in the deployment's life hit 13.05s (cold connection/JIT); subsequent 9 calls all sub-3ms. Stats here are the 10-sample post-deploy check, not that single cold call.

latency.method: 60 samples/group via a fresh bun fetch client hitting http://localhost:7180 directly (no CLI overhead); novel groups use 60 one-time crypto.randomUUID()-suffixed query strings (never embedded before, guaranteed cache miss by content-hash); warm groups run 5 discarded warmups then 60 measured calls against one fixed repeated query. Client wall-clock measured with performance.now() around fetch(); server-side searchMs/embedMs read from each response's receipt (QUASAR_SEARCH_PROFILE=1).

run1_contaminated.note: this run overlapped a concurrent live ingest daemon burst (POST /ingest/session spans of 36504ms and 24236ms in the same window) which head-of-line-blocked one search request to 24789ms server-side / 33518ms client-side. Reported honestly, not discarded.

run2_clean_rerun.note: re-run ~2 minutes later once the ingest burst settled; sample index 0 (clientMs 3550.37, searchMs 899, embedMs 230) is a first-request cold-connection artifact consistent with the /ready first-call also costing 13.05s earlier in this same session -- reported below both with and without it.

novelFilteredProjectRoleSemantic.scopeArrayMaskingConfirmed: yes -- vectorMatrix.ts:87-94,155-171 implements projectKeyCodes/roleCodes/providerCodes as per-slot dictionary-encoded Uint8/Uint32 arrays resident in the matrix, masked in-process ('no SQL, no store round trip'); measured serverSearchMs (p95 37ms) is materially lower than the unfiltered semantic serverSearchMs (p95 101-150ms) because filtering shrinks the candidate/assembly set, not because it adds a SQL WHERE cost -- consistent with e8c2516 and inconsistent with the deleted SQL-prefilter design

clientEndToEnd.note: dominated by the required per-query embed cost (~130ms mean, unavoidable for a genuinely novel query), not by the vector-scan itself

gateFailureSummary: No crash-loop, no p95>1s, RSS and warm-mode gates all pass, and the in-matrix scope-array masking (e8c2516) is confirmed working with server-side searchMs comfortably under gate on every novel variant (max p95 101-150ms). The failing gates are all the SAME root cause: end-to-end client latency for a genuinely novel query is dominated by the ~85-250ms (mean ~130ms) local fp32 ONNX per-query embed cost on this contended host (8 vectorMatrix worker threads + a continuously-running live ingest daemon sharing the container's CPU), pushing client p95 to 210-246ms against a 150ms/100ms bar. This is not a crash-loop and is well under the 1s revert threshold, so no revert was performed; reported as a genuine, unfixed gate miss rather than rounded up.
